slice: resilient audio evidence export for mobile browsers

behavior.primary: copy a privacy-filtered audio evidence packet to the clipboard
behavior.fallback: download the same packet as JSON when clipboard APIs are unavailable or rejected
behavior.accessibility: announce copied, downloaded, or failed status through a polite live region
behavior.safety: export remains restricted to the existing SAFE_KEYS allowlist

verification.source_contract: filename sanitization and fallback behavior are represented in committed source
verification.contract_test: test updated to require deterministic sanitized filenames

limits: No iPhone audible outcome was captured in this run.
Browser evidence does not prove physical speaker output.
The latest commit was not successfully deployed because Vercel reported a build-rate limit.
The connector did not provide an executable checkout, so the Node contract was not run locally in this run.
